title: **🏹 Putrec Loot Hunter**
description: Get Putrec to watch da prizez and yell at ya when dere'z loot to take.
user_flows_1: Pick da game ya wanna rob
user_flows_2: Go in and pick what shiny stuff ya want to watch.
task_map_1: Stuff: I got a lizt of what it'z worth.
task_map_2: Alertz: I'll yell in yer ear when it'z cheap enough to buy.
admin_flows_1: Go in da groundz to turn 'em on from da Boss View.

poe2.title: 💎 **Lootz in Path of Exile 2** 👺
poe2.description: Get Putrec to watch da prizez and yell at ya
poe2.league_description: Dere'z da different leaguez ya can pick and da hot loot in dat league.

dropdown.league_standard_description: Pick da borin' league of POE2
dropdown.league_fate_of_the_vaal_description: Pick da Fate of da Vaal league of POE2
dropdown.league_hardcore_description: Pick da Hardcore league of POE2
dropdown.poe2_off_description: Put da POE2 subrole to sleep
dropdown.hunter_frequency_description: Set how often I watch da loot
